parameters.content:
## MeshMinds PrintChecker v2

### One-time setup
Settings → Environment Variables:
`ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` = `sk-ant-api03-...`

---

### Flow: POST /idea  (fires when URL is pasted)
```
Webhook: URL Submit
  → Scrape URL (idea)          15s timeout, continueOnFail
  → Extract Context (idea)     __NEXT_DATA__ → plain text fallback
  → Respond: URL Received      { status:'ok', productContext:'...' }
```
Frontend stores productContext in memory while user
fills the questionnaire.

### Flow: POST /idea2  (fires when user submits analysis)
```
Webhook: Analysis Request
  → Code: Resolve Context
      body.productContext → use it (pre-scraped, fast path)
      body.description   → wrap as free-text idea
      body.url only      → productContext='', trigger scrape
  → IF: Needs Scrape?  (productContext is empty?)
      TRUE  → Scrape URL (idea2) → Extract Context (idea2)
      FALSE → skip
  → Build Claude Prompt   injects productContext + all user inputs
  → Call Claude           claude-sonnet-4-6, 2048 tokens
  → Extract Analysis JSON
  → Respond: Analysis Complete
```

### /idea2 payload (from frontend)
`{ url|description, productContext?, category, marketplace,
   priceRange, printTime, material, extraCosts, experience,
   activeMarkets[], socialMedia[], sellFrom, sellTo, legalFlags[] }`
